title: Coffee & Donuts
description: The classic 18V tradition. Show up, grab a coffee, swap a story on the ramp. No agenda. Just community. Free and open to all.

title: Pancake Breakfast — Great Turnout!
description: Over 100 people showed up for our first Pancake Breakfast Fly-In of 2026. Thank you to everyone who flew in or drove out. Stay tuned for the next one.
